title: Certámen — the lawful wizard's duel
fatigue: Weakening − Resistance: every 5 points (or fraction) over = 1 Fatigue level lost by the loser. Certámen causes ONLY exhaustion, never wounds; excess Fatigue = unconsciousness (1 extra hour per level beyond your total).
victory: Win when the opponent falls unconscious (the winner may then cast one free spell of the same Te/Fo that bypasses Parma but not Form resistance), surrenders, or fails a Concentration roll.
note: Present in the core book; House Tremere specialises (a Minor Magical Focus doubling the lower of Te/Fo). Each round each magus uses one Art to attack and the other to defend, and may swap which is which between rounds.
